parameters.subject: Just checking in 👋 – Is this your email?
parameters.message:
=Hi There, {{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').item.json.Name }}

We’re just sending a quick hello from Midknight Automation Agency! ✨

THIS IS YOUR UNIQUE VALIDATION CODE:↩️
📌 {{ $json.Authentication_token }}
👆🏻COPY AND PASTE THIS AS A REPLY👆🏻

This is a validation email to make sure we can reach you at this address. In the future, we’ll be sending you updates, tips, and information about our automation services.

While you’re here, feel free to check out and subscribe to our YouTube channels for coding, gaming, and creative content:

Midknight Coding    
  (https://www.youtube.com/@MidknightCodingYt)
Midknight Gaming  
  (https://www.youtube.com/@MidknightGamingYT)
Midknight Discovery 
  (https://www.youtube.com/@MidknightDiscoveryYt)
The Beauty Gallery  
  (https://www.youtube.com/@TheBeautyGalleryYt)
Songs of Stories 
  (https://www.youtube.com/@SongsOfStoriesOfficial)

🔍 Again this is a validation email, so please respond
USING THIS VALIDATION CODE:↩️
📌 {{ $json.Authentication_token }} 

Thanks for being here, and we look forward to connecting soon!
Warm regards,

Midknight Automation Agency ✨

assignments.value: =The email {{ $('Verification Code').item.json.email }} is in right format confirm it exist by replying to the verification code sent to your email
